judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Processor must notify Controller of a Data Breach within twenty-four (24) hours after becoming aware of it.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Controller may conduct audits of Processor’s Processing of Personal Data at any time without prior notice.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Upon termination or expiration of the Agreement, Processor is required to delete all Personal Data without exception.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Processor may transfer Personal Data outside the EEA or the United Kingdom without any additional safeguards.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Processor’s aggregate liability for Data Breaches is unlimited.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Processor must notify Controller without undue delay and in any event within forty-eight (48) hours after becoming aware of a Data Breach affecting Personal Data.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Controller may, upon at least fifteen (15) business days’ prior written notice and no more than once per calendar year, conduct an audit of Processor’s Processing of Personal Data.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Upon termination or expiration of the Agreement, Processor shall, at Controller’s choice, delete or return all Personal Data to Controller and delete existing copies, unless applicable law requires storage of the Personal Data.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Processor may engage Sub-Processors to Process Personal Data on behalf of Controller, provided that Processor gives Controller at least thirty (30) days’ prior written notice of any intended addition or replacement of Sub-Processors.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Processor’s aggregate liability for Data Breaches under this DPA shall not exceed EUR 1,000,000.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Processor shall not transfer Personal Data outside the EEA or the United Kingdom unless it has taken measures necessary to ensure the transfer is in compliance with Data Protection Laws.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: The Service Provider warrants that Deliverables will materially conform to the specifications in the applicable SOW for one year after delivery.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days’ written notice.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: The obligations in the Confidentiality section survive for the entire duration of the Agreement after termination.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Each party’s total liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $250,000, regardless of the amount of Fees paid.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Service Provider is liable for all indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages under this Agreement.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Service Provider shall perform the Services and deliver the Deliverables in accordance with the applicable SOW and any SLA.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Client shall pay all Fees within thirty (30) days of receipt of a valid invoice.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Service Provider may suspend Services upon ten (10) days’ written notice if undisputed Fees remain unpaid after the due date.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: All Intellectual Property Rights in Deliverables (excluding Service Provider’s pre-existing materials and third-party materials) shall be assigned to Client upon full payment of Fees, except as otherwise set forth in an SOW.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Either party may terminate this Agreement or any SOW for material breach by the other party if such breach is not cured within thirty (30) days after written notice.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Each party’s total liability under this Agreement shall not exceed the total Fees paid or payable by Client to Service Provider under the applicable SOW in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim, or $250,000, whichever is less.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Provider may suspend Customer’s access to the Service immediately upon late payment, without any prior notice period.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Service credits for SLA failures can be requested at any time after the month in which the SLA was not met, with no deadline.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: The limitation of liability applies to all claims, including those arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or breach of data ownership obligations.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Upon termination, Provider is not required to make Customer Data available for download after access to the Service ceases.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: The Subscription Term will automatically renew for successive three (3) year periods unless notice of non-renewal is provided.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Provider grants Customer a non-exclusive, non-transferable right to access and use the Service during the Subscription Term, solely for Customer’s internal business purposes and up to the number of Authorized Users specified in the Order Form.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Customer shall pay all Fees within thirty (30) days of invoice date, and late payments accrue interest at 1.5% per month or the maximum allowed by law, whichever is less.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Unless otherwise stated in the Order Form, the Subscription Term will automatically renew for successive one (1) year periods unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least sixty (60) days prior to the end of the then-current Subscription Term.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Provider will use commercially reasonable efforts to make the Service available with a Monthly Uptime Percentage of at least 99.5%, excluding scheduled maintenance (with at least 48 hours’ notice) and force majeure events.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Either party may terminate this Agreement for material breach by the other party if such breach is not cured within thirty (30) days after written notice.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Upon termination, Customer’s access to the Service will cease, and Provider will make Customer Data available for download for thirty (30) days following termination.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: The obligations of confidentiality and non-use with respect to Confidential Information survive indefinitely following the expiration or termination of this Agreement.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Upon written request by the Disclosing Party, the Receiving Party must return or destroy all tangible materials containing Confidential Information within five (5) business days.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: The Receiving Party is prohibited from disclosing Confidential Information to any third party under any circumstances.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: If the Receiving Party is required by law to disclose Confidential Information, it does not need to provide any prior written notice to the Disclosing Party.

judge_only.label: fabricated
judge_only.claim: Neither Party may assign this Agreement under any circumstances without the prior written consent of the other Party.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: The Receiving Party shall use the Confidential Information solely for the Permitted Purpose.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: The Receiving Party shall not disclose Confidential Information to any third party except its Representatives.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: If the Receiving Party is required by law, regulation, or court order to disclose any Confidential Information, it shall provide the Disclosing Party with at least ten (10) business days’ prior written notice unless prohibited by law.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Upon written request by the Disclosing Party, the Receiving Party shall promptly, and in any event within fifteen (15) business days, return or destroy all tangible materials containing Confidential Information and certify in writing that such return or destruction has been completed, except that one archival copy may be retained solely for legal or compliance purposes.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: The obligations of confidentiality and non-use with respect to Confidential Information shall survive for a period of five (5) years following the expiration or termination of this Agreement, except for trade secrets, which shall be protected for so long as they remain trade secrets under applicable law.

judge_only.label: genuine
judge_only.claim: Neither Party may assign this Agreement without the prior written consent of the other Party, except to a successor in interest in connection with a merger or sale of substantially all assets.

gate_teeth_off.label: fabricated
